---
title: "test_contextual_persona.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_contextual_persona.py"
loc: 49
complexity: 1
logic_score: 5.77
style_score: 3.64
intel_score: 6.30
overall_score: 4.58
---

## Intent
The `test_contextual_persona.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on dialogue_engine, test_odin_reacts_to_defiance, test_alfred_provides_syntax_guidance, test_dialogue_fallback_on_no_match. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via dialogue_engine, test_odin_reacts_to_defiance, test_alfred_provides_syntax_guidance, test_dialogue_fallback_on_no_match. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.engine.alfred_observer](file://src.core.engine.alfred_observer)
- [src.core.engine.dialogue](file://src.core.engine.dialogue)
- [src.core.personas](file://src.core.personas)

### Exports
- `dialogue_engine`
- `test_odin_reacts_to_defiance`
- `test_alfred_provides_syntax_guidance`
- `test_dialogue_fallback_on_no_match`
